CA.Name: TimeTracker
CA.Overview: Self-hosted time tracking and project management for freelancers and teams.
CA.Description:
TimeTracker is a web-based time tracking application with project management, invoicing, and reporting.
Install TimeTracker-DB first, then TimeTracker. Both containers use the custom timetracker network.
Documentation: https://github.com/drytrix/TimeTracker/blob/main/docs/admin/deployment/DISTRIBUTION.md
